title: Cleaner CV Example UK — Office, Domestic & Commercial

cv.name: Maria Santos
cv.title: Commercial Cleaner
cv.summary: Reliable commercial cleaner with 5 years in office and retail environments across Central London. Skilled in COSHH procedures, infection control, and team supervision. Enhanced DBS held. Available early mornings and weekends.

bullets: Supervised team of 6 cleaners across 3 office sites with 98% client satisfaction scores
Implemented colour-coded cloth system reducing cross-contamination complaints to zero
Completed COSHH training and maintained accurate chemical usage logs
Cleaned high-footfall retail units before opening — floors, toilets, and food courts
Reported maintenance issues promptly to reduce slip hazards

education.raw:
NVQ Level 2 Cleaning & Support Services — 2019
Enhanced DBS (Update Service)
